positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos_tom_rent
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u33,axiom,
    ~more_than(X0,X1) | more_than_eq(X0,X1)).

cnf(u32,axiom,
    more_than(amount_2000,amount_1500)).

cnf(u35,axiom,
    more_than_eq(amount_2000,amount_1500)).

cnf(u34,axiom,
    ~more_than(X1,X2) | ~more_than_eq(X0,X1) | more_than(X0,X2)).

cnf(u36,axiom,
    ~more_than_eq(X0,amount_2000) | more_than(X0,amount_1500)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define owner(X0,X1) := $true
for all inputs,
    define managed_building(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define deposit_required(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define rent_amount(X0,X1) := $true
for all inputs,
    define cat(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define pet(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define allows_pets(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define allowed_to_move_in(X0,X1,X2) := $true
for all inputs,
    define will_rent(X0,X1) := $false
for all inputs,
    define deposit_amount(X0,X1) := $false
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
